title: htmlcsjs' tech mod
description: GregTech CEu addon mainly dealing in high power and lasers
body:
# THIS MOD IS DEPRECATED - IT WILL NOT BE UPDATED OR SUPPORTED ### The main feature added by this mod has been superseded by CEu itself, see pr [#1900](https://github.com/gregtechceu/gregtech/pull/1900)
This is a VERY WIP addon to GregTech CEu ([curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gregtech-ce-unofficial)) that adds an assortment of things, mainly for the player to have fun with Currently it adds laser diodes to help you with transportation of large amounts of energy around the base, but having the drawback of not being able to turn it, and it requiring the use of large multiblocks. In later updates I hope to expand on the laser system.
